markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content analysis and brainstorm new thought leadership angles.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Influencer Content Formula:** A successful formula was identified: `Bold Claim → Personal Story → Old vs. New → Specific Examples → Framework → Hot Take`.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**"Portfolio Operator" Series:** A new content series will break down Guillaume's advisory model into digestible parts (e.g., equity focus, operator credibility), replacing a stalled, monolithic piece.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**New Content Angles:** Key topics for high-engagement posts were identified, including "Why are there so many French people in growth?" and a "hero's journey" narrative of the advisory practice.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [**Positioning Shift:** The content strategy will shift from competing on "most advanced" to owning the "sage at the top of the mountain" narrative, leveraging Guillaume's 15+ years of experience.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

## Topics

### Influencer Content Analysis

  - [An analysis of top influencers (e.g., Lenny Rachitsky, Kyla) revealed a consistent formula for high engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Key Engagement Drivers:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Personal stories \> pure theory](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Controversial takes](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Specific company examples for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Identified Formula:** `Bold Claim → Personal Story → Old vs. New → Specific Examples → Framework → Hot Take`.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### "Portfolio Operator" Content Series

  - [A new content series, "Portfolio Operator Playbook," will break down Guillaume's advisory model into its core components.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach replaces a stalled, monolithic piece on "10 years of advisory" with smaller, digestible articles and posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [**Core Components to Cover:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
      - [**Equity Focus:** Explain the model's goal of aggregating equity and why it drives specific client selection (e.g., the "three-circle advisory test").](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)
      - [**Operator Credibility:** Emphasize the value of hands-on experience over pure consulting.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [**VC Network:** Highlight the role of the network in sourcing opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### New Content Angles & Positioning

  - [**"Why are there so many French people in growth?"**](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** A unique intersection of factors.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
          - [**Culture & Education:** High-quality engineering schools + a Latin culture of working around rules.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
          - [**Entrepreneurship:** A higher startup density in France.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
          - [**Early Influence:** Guillaume's role in popularizing growth in France.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)
      - [**Action:** Validate the hypothesis with data on French representation in growth teams and tools.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [**"The 7-Year Wasteland" / Hero's Journey**](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [**Angle:** A narrative of the advisory practice's evolution, including early failures and lessons learned.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Admitting failure creates a relatable "hero's journey" arc that resonates with audiences.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [**Positioning Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**From:** Competing on "most advanced" growth tactics.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**To:** Owning the "sage at the top of the mountain" narrative, leveraging 15+ years of experience.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

### Content Cadence & Distribution

  - [**Influencer Cadence:** 2–5 posts per week.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Repurpose long-form content (e.g., newsletter) into multiple LinkedIn posts to drive curiosity and traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [**Geotargeting:** LinkedIn's lack of geotargeting is a limitation for French-specific content, but posting in both English and French will be explored.](https://fathom.video/share/Ln7XA9CJ6d55mEP7jsjVNbGin9QN5Yow?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

## Next Steps
